response:
Subject: Appeal to Unblock My Account  

Dear Google Support,  

I am writing to appeal the recent blocking of my account, which was initiated due to suspicious payment activities that I did not initiate. I have reviewed the details provided and confirm that the payments in question were made by mistake or misunderstanding. I am committed to resolving this issue promptly and am willing to provide additional information if needed.  

I request that my account be unblocked and that I be granted access to my account immediately. Thank you for your attention to this matter.  

Sincerely,  
[Your Name]
